{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
